title: Notification Settings
description: Configure which events trigger in-app and email notifications. You can subscribe to job completion alerts, study status changes, cohort updates, and system announcements.
tips: Enable job completion notifications to be alerted when long-running analyses or ingestion jobs finish.
Study status change alerts notify you when a colleague updates a study you are a member of.
Email notifications require a verified email address — check your profile settings if emails are not arriving.
You can mute notifications for individual studies without disabling global notification preferences.
